_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Author, maintain, and enforce the enterprise data policy library, ensuring policies are current, accessible, enforced, and aligned with regulatory requirements.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Task RC-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-T-003 (OP, cosine: 0.488), DG-K-008 (DG, cosine: 0.468).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.510). Shared vocabulary: [maintain, policy]. NICE-only terms [organizational, program] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, aligned, author, current, data, enforce] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.912, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.061 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 20 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Maintain the organizational policy program" and "Author, maintain, and enforce the enterprise data policy library, ensuring polic" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.556 ≈ STS 0.510 (gap 0.046). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [maintain, policy] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [maintain, policy]. NICE-only: [organizational, program]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, aligned, author, current, data, enforce].
